requestment_date.text: วันที่ขอกู้

begining_of_contract.text: วันที่รับเงิน

loan_type.text: ประเภทเงินกู้

root.sql:
select sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no , sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_description , sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no ) as memname , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_salary( sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no ) as salary , sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_share_value , sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_old_loan , sc_lon_m_loan_request.real_receive , sc_lon_m_loan_request.begining_of_contract , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date , 'MONTH (ตามวัน)' ) as requestment_month_form , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date , 'MONTH' ) as requestment_month , current_date , sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date , sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_request_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.max_loan_permit , (select coalesce(sum(sc_lon_m_loan_history.principal_of_loan),0) from sc_lon_m_loan_history where sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ) as principal_of_loan , (case when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type in ('33','34','35') then 'กู้สามัญวิทยะฐานะ' when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = '02' then 'กู้ฉุกเฉินปันผล' when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = '23' then 'กู้สวัสดิการกองทุนสงเคราะห์สมาชิกถึงแก่กรรม' when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = '24' then 'กู้สามัญ 25 เท่าของเงินบำนาญ/บำเหน็จ' when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = '25' then 'กู้สามัญสินเชื่อส่วนบุคคล' when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = '30' then 'กู้รวมหนี้สถาบันการเงิน' when sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = '61' then 'กู้พิเศษเพื่อที่อยู่อาศัยบ้านหลังแรก' else substr(sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description,9) end)as loan_type_description , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group( sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no ) as member_group , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name( pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no )) as member_group_name , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount from sc_lon_m_loan_request , sc_lon_m_contract , sc_lon_m_rule , sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type and sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_code = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_objective_code and sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_type = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type and sc_lon_m_loan_request.cancel_status = '0' and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type = '22'
/*WHERE*/ order by sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no , sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no
